videos.headline: New Mexico State prevails in 2OT to beat Louisiana Tech
videos.description: New Mexico State outlasts Louisiana Tech in double overtime thanks to a clutch rushing touchdown by Mike Washington.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (New Mexico State prevails in 2OT to beat Louisiana Tech) 2024/10/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Parker Awad throws 53-yard TD to TJ Pride for New Mexico State
videos.description: Parker Awad throws 53-yard TD to TJ Pride for New Mexico State

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Parker Awad throws 53-yard TD to TJ Pride for New Mexico State) 2024/10/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Evan Bullock throws 7-yard touchdown to Tru Edwards
videos.description: Evan Bullock throws 7-yard touchdown to Tru Edwards

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Evan Bullock throws 7-yard touchdown to Tru Edwards) 2024/10/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: A helping paw! Dog retrieves kicking tee from the field
videos.description: After the kickoff to start the second half, a dog runs onto the field to grab the tee during the Louisiana Tech-New Mexico State game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (A helping paw! Dog retrieves kicking tee from the field) 2024/10/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: New Mexico State comes up with big FG block to force OT
videos.description: Louisiana Tech's Buck Buchanan tries to kick a winning field goal as time expires, but it gets blocked by New Mexico State to force overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (New Mexico State comes up with big FG block to force OT) 2024/10/16 ESHEET
